name: Interest Netting (Zero Net Rate)

eligibility.description: Applies to the same taxpayer with equivalent underpayments and overpayments for the same period; requires identifying and establishing the overlapping periods to the IRS.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Eliminates interest charges on overlapping periods where a taxpayer has both an underpayment and an overpayment of tax, resulting in a net interest rate of zero.
